positive: A minimalist, stylized silhouette design featuring a majestic arctic fox peering over a snowy mound. The fox is rendered in crisp black lines, contrasted sharply against a vibrant, painterly indigo and cerulean blue gradient background. Incorporate subtle, abstract mountain range peaks in a lighter sapphire blue, giving depth. The overall style should be a blend of modern folk art and Scandinavian naturalism, highly detailed yet clean, suitable for direct transfer onto fabric. Strong emphasis on clean lines, bold contrast, and a central, balanced composition. Lighting is diffuse and ethereal, enhancing the silhouette effect. Vector art quality, maximal print readiness.
